name: Expansion Navigation
description: GPS Hud, 3D markers, Improved 2D map and more.
overview: Expansion Navigation provides GPS functionality, custom map markers, and 3D waypoints. Players can set personal markers, share locations with group members, and use the GPS device for real-time positioning. Server owners can configure which navigation features are available and restrict them to require in-game items.
installation: Add to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Configure navigation features and item requirements.

troubleshooting.solution: Check NeedGPSItemForPosition — player may need the GPS item in inventory.
Ensure persistence is enabled and marker storage is configured.

useCases.title: Hardcore Navigation
useCases.description: Require both GPS and map items for full navigation — adds survival challenge.

useCases.title: Casual Server
useCases.description: Disable item requirements for easy access to all navigation features.

quickSettings.name: EnableMap3DMarkers
quickSettings.description: Show 3D markers in the world from map markers.

quickSettings.name: NeedGPSItemForPosition
quickSettings.description: Require players to have a GPS item to see their position.

quickSettings.name: NeedMapItemForMap
quickSettings.description: Require players to have a map item to open the map.

useCases.title: Hardcore Navigation
useCases.description: Require both GPS and map items for full navigation — adds survival challenge.

useCases.title: Casual Server
useCases.description: Disable item requirements for easy access to all navigation features.
